units.unit_name: Practical Examination for Visually Challenged Students Class XI
topics: Characterization and Purification of Chemical Substances: Crystallization of an impure sample (copper sulphate, benzoic acid)
Experiments based on pH: Determination of pH of solutions from fruit juices/known concentrations; Comparing pH of strong and weak acids
Chemical Equilibrium: Shift in equilibrium between ferric ions/thiocyanate ions; Shift in equilibrium between [Co(H2O)6] and chloride ions
Quantitative estimation: Preparation of standard solution of oxalic acid; Determination of molarity of sodium hydroxide by titration against oxalic acid
Qualitative Analysis: Determination of one anion and one cation (NH4+, CO3, S, SO3, Cl, CH3COO); Detection of Nitrogen in organic compound; Detection of Halogen in organic compound
